session_server_like_config(3) Library Functions Manual session_server_like_config(3)

NAME

session_server_like_config

SYNOPSIS

#include <src/common/session/server_like.h>

Data Fields


session_server_like_init_fn init_fn
void * init_user_data
session_server_like_run_fn run_fn
void * run_user_data
session_server_like_interrupt_fn interrupt_fn
session_server_like_status_fn status_fn
void * status_user_data

Detailed Description

Configuration for session_server_like_run()

All logging, terminal, and signal settings are read automatically from GET_OPTION() inside the function. Callers only provide the callbacks and user data below.

Definition at line 132 of file server_like.h.

Field Documentation

session_server_like_init_fn session_server_like_config::init_fn

Mode-specific initialization callback. (required, never NULL)

Definition at line 141 of file server_like.h.

Referenced by session_server_like_run().

void* session_server_like_config::init_user_data

User data passed to init_fn

Definition at line 144 of file server_like.h.

Referenced by session_server_like_run().

session_server_like_interrupt_fn session_server_like_config::interrupt_fn

Async-signal-safe interrupt callback. (required, never NULL)

Installed via set_interrupt_callback() wrapper so SIGINT/SIGTERM reaches it without each mode registering its own signal handler.

Definition at line 162 of file server_like.h.

Referenced by session_server_like_run().

session_server_like_run_fn session_server_like_config::run_fn

Mode-specific blocking main loop callback. (required, never NULL)

Definition at line 150 of file server_like.h.

Referenced by session_server_like_run().

void* session_server_like_config::run_user_data

User data passed to run_fn

Definition at line 153 of file server_like.h.

Referenced by session_server_like_run().

session_server_like_status_fn session_server_like_config::status_fn

Status data callback. (optional, NULL = no status screen even if --status-screen is set)

Decoupled from tcp_server_t so both server (has tcp_server_t) and discovery-service (embeds tcp_server_t inside acds_server_t) can provide status without type constraints.

Definition at line 176 of file server_like.h.

void* session_server_like_config::status_user_data

User data passed to status_fn
